positive: A central, stylized illustration featuring a mystical forest creature, designed for screen printing on a t-shirt. The creature is a hybrid of a fox and a spirit wolf, standing dynamically in a lush, ethereal woodland setting. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of indigo, forest green, burnt orange, and cream. The style should be bold linework, reminiscent of vintage nature posters mixed with modern neo-traditional tattoo art. Composition must feature the creature prominently in the center, with the forest elements surrounding it creating a powerful, clean silhouette. Cinematic lighting with sharp shadows and highlights, giving the image depth but maintaining print flatness. Highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect for textile application. Rule of thirds placement, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient, solid color blocks, low contrast, photographic, realistic, logo, trademark, celebrity
